error.title: Couldn't reach nanobot
error.gatewayHint: Make sure the gateway is running (`nanobot gateway`) and that this page is open on the same machine.

auth.title: Authentication required
auth.hint: Enter the secret configured as tokenIssueSecret in your gateway config.

account.logoutHint: Disconnect this browser from the gateway.

meta.description: nanobot web UI — chat with your nanobot workspace.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete “{{title}}”?
deleteConfirm.description: The session file will be removed from disk. This cannot be undone.

empty.greeting: What can I do for you?

plan.title: Create a project plan
plan.prompt: Create a concise project plan for what I should build next.

analyze.title: Analyze this data
analyze.prompt: Help me analyze this data and call out the most important patterns.

brainstorm.title: Brainstorm ideas
brainstorm.prompt: Brainstorm a few practical ideas and tradeoffs for this problem.

code.title: Write code
code.prompt: Help me write the code for this task, starting with the smallest useful change.

summarize.title: Summarize this document
summarize.prompt: Summarize this document and list the key takeaways.

more.title: More
more.prompt: Show me a few useful ways you can help in this workspace.

composer.sendHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

new.title: New chat
new.description: Stop the current task and start a fresh conversation.

stop.title: Stop current task
stop.description: Cancel the active agent turn for this chat.

restart.title: Restart nanobot
restart.description: Restart the bot process in place.

status.title: Show status
status.description: Display runtime, provider, and channel status.

history.title: Show conversation history
history.description: Print the last N persisted conversation messages.

dream_log.title: Show Dream log
dream_log.description: Show what the last Dream consolidation changed.

dream_restore.title: Restore memory
dream_restore.description: Revert memory to a previous Dream snapshot.

imageRejected.magic_mismatch: File doesn't look like a real image
imageRejected.too_large: Image is too large — try a smaller one

messageTooBig.title: Message too large
messageTooBig.body: The server rejected your last message because it exceeded the size limit. Remove some images or try smaller files, then send again.
